page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. It features 52 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance is provisioned with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core.

This instance utilizes the KVM hypervisor and does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this configuration.

The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent CPU performance without resource contention from other tenants, though the lack of hyperthreading reduces concurrent thread density compared to standard virtualized environments. The 1:3.69 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a balanced resource profile. It is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and moderate memory capacity, such as in-memory caching, database nodes, and general-purpose enterprise applications that do not require local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p-redis.13xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. It delivers 52 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring no hyperthreading overhead and dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing 3.69 GB of memory per core. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps and operates on the KVM hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The lack of hyperthreading ensures that each core has exclusive access to execution resources, which improves performance predictability. The dedicated CPU architecture makes it suitable for workloads requiring predictable compute performance, such as database hosting, in-memory caching, and general-purpose enterprise applications, though users must provision external storage for data persistence.

tagline: A dedicated 52-core Intel Xeon server with 192 GB RAM and 12 Gbps network bandwidth for predictable, non-hyperthreaded workloads.

192.0 GB of system memory providing 3.69 GB per core.
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation.

Suited for in-memory caching, database nodes, and enterprise applications.
